brand_dna.category: Premium craft spirits - Kentucky bourbon, tequila, mezcal, and Irish whiskey cream sold direct and through retail/wholesale partners.
brand_dna.core_belief: Great bourbon deserves great storytelling - every bottle tells a story of authenticity, quality, and innovation.
proof_points: Awarded 'Best Cask-Finished Straight Bourbon Whiskey' of 2025 by the Beverage Tasting Institute
Over 60 years of combined experience in the spirits industry
No artificial flavors in the flagship Kentucky 10 bourbon
Retailer and wholesaler placements with Kroger, Total Wine and More, Specs, Binny's, Johnson Brothers and more
brand_dna.positioning: Premium, heritage-driven craft spirits with limited-edition collector releases - authenticity and story over mass-market volume.

voice_pillars.name: Heritage Storyteller
voice_pillars.desc: Frames every bottle as a piece of history and tradition worth celebrating, not just a product.

voice_pillars.name: Craft-Proud
voice_pillars.desc: Leads with earned quality markers - awards, aging, and no shortcuts.
voice_pillars.quote: Crafted with precision, aged to perfection.

voice_pillars.name: Bold and Unapologetic
voice_pillars.desc: Uses confident, edgy language for its more daring releases.
voice_pillars.quote: This is not your grandmother's drink.

voice_pillars.name: Occasion-Driven
voice_pillars.desc: Ties pours to milestones and shared moments that matter.

phrases: Discover the legacy. Taste the difference.
we don't just sell bourbon-we craft experiences
Championships are remembered. Legends are celebrated.
This is not your grandmother's drink.
sharing a pour with family and friends

icp: US bourbon and spirits enthusiasts aged 21+ who value heritage, craftsmanship, and story, and who collect or gift limited-edition premium bottles for milestone moments.

personas.name: Bourbon Collector
personas.description: Enthusiast who chases one-time-only and small-batch releases; moved by scarcity, awards, and collector's-edition framing.

personas.name: Milestone Gifter
personas.description: Buyer marking a moment - a championship, an anniversary, America's 250th; moved by story, packaging, and occasion.

personas.name: Adventurous Palate
personas.description: Drinker exploring bold spirits like mezcal and high-proof Irish cream; moved by flavor detail and edgy, unexpected positioning.

products_ladder.title: Play Like A Champion Today Limited Collector's Edition
Kentucky 10 Straight Bourbon: Wheated Small Batch
Kentucky 10 Straight Bourbon: Barrel Strength Hand Selected

offers: Limited-edition and one-time-only releases (Play Like a Champion Today 2nd Edition - 2,500 left; Liberty 1776)
Shipping calculated at checkout; allow 3 days fulfillment and 1-5 business days delivery
Refund or replacement for damaged or defective items if requested within 3 days with photo/video proof
Adult (21+) signature required on all alcohol deliveries

allowed.claim: Awarded 'Best Cask-Finished Straight Bourbon Whiskey' of 2025 by the Beverage Tasting Institute.
Over 60 years of combined experience in the spirits industry.
Hard Chaw contains 50% more alcohol by volume than traditional Irish Cream (25% ALC / 50 Proof).
Made exclusively in Ireland from Irish Whiskey, Irish Cream and Irish Potcheen.
Limited-edition, one-time release that will not be produced again (Liberty 1776).

banned.why: FTC Green Guides - unqualified sustainability claim with no verifiable backing.

banned.claim: '100% recycled' or 'carbon neutral' bottles or packaging.
banned.why: FTC Green Guides - unqualified recycled/carbon claim without specific, verifiable proof.

banned.claim: Health or wellness benefits from drinking (e.g. 'good for you', 'aids digestion').
banned.why: Medical claim not supported by the site and not permitted for alcohol.

banned.claim: 'Best bourbon in the world' or unqualified superiority claims.
banned.why: Unsubstantiated superlative - only the specific 2025 Beverage Tasting Institute award is verifiable.
FTC Green Guides - unqualified environmental claim with no backing in the source material.
